source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/250915 필리핀Carewell 포터블,23G 등록서류 - 송조운 프로님/251015 추가요청서류/A-OIS-5-005 자사 Detector 출하검사 기준서_rev.01 (1).xls

sourceSummary.oneLine: A-OIS-5-005 is a revision 1 shipping inspection work instruction for in-house Detector inspection and A MCW Series packaging.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to define shipping inspection, imaging inspection, acceptance criteria, equipment, handling precautions, and packaging checks for Detector products.
keyPoints: The document applies to 1G, 2G, and 3G Detector models for appearance and imaging inspection.
Revision history states initial issue on 8/30/24 and revision 1 on 12/17/24 for added inspection items due to F/W update.
Inspection steps include appearance condition, Rear Cover deformation, detector height, battery fit, weight, MAC address, calibration files, trigger modes, and phantom image capture.
Packaging page identifies 품명/모델 as A MCW Series and includes label, component, accessory, and box packing checks.
Work precautions cite control under ISO13485 and nonconforming product handling under AQP802.

concepts.name: AQP802 부적합관리 규정
concepts.evidence: 기능 불량 발생시 AQP802 부적합관리 규정에 의해 처리

evidence.claim: The document title is 자사 Detector 출하검사 작업지도서.
Revision number 1 added inspection items due to F/W update.
The revision date shown in page headers is 12/17/24.
The applicable models for inspection pages are 1G, 2G, and 3G Detector.
Appearance inspection includes checking detector appearance, Rear Cover deformation, detector height, battery fit, and detector weight.
evidence.evidenceText: Detector 외관상태를 확인; Rear Cover 변형 상태를 확인; Detector 높이 측정; Battery 및 Battery Cover 형합; Detector 중량 측정

evidence.claim: Detector height acceptance criterion is 14 mm to 15.9 mm.
MAC Address inspection criterion is that there must be no duplication.
Imaging inspection includes Normal Mode and AED Mode image capture and defect checks.
evidence.evidenceText: Nomal Mode 영상 촬영...Defect 발생 유무를 확인; AED Mode 영상 촬영...Defect 발생 유무를 확인

evidence.claim: The document references NorTrg and AED calibration file download from a NAS server.
evidence.evidenceText: nas 서버에서 NorTrg 및 AED Cal File을 다운로드 한다.

evidence.claim: The imaging process uses HAND, CHEST, and SKULL phantoms with stated exposure settings.
evidence.evidenceText: HAND Phantom... (50kV / 100mA / 50 msec); CHEST Phantom... (80kV / 250mA / 32 msec); SKULL Phantom... (70kV / 250mA / 100 msec)

evidence.claim: Packaging page identifies the model as A MCW Series.
Packaging quality checks include label inspection, component confirmation, and accessory omission confirmation.
evidence.evidenceText: 라벨 검사...구성품 확인...ACC 누락 여부 확인

evidence.claim: Work precautions state management under ISO13485.
Product handling precautions state functional defects are processed under AQP802 nonconformance management regulation.
evidence.evidenceText: 제품 취급시 파손에 주의하며 기능 불량 발생시 AQP802 부적합관리 규정에 의해 처리

reviewFlags.reason: No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is named in the source text despite authoritySignal being overseas.
Cover area lists 개정일자 as '-' while revision history and page headers list 12/17/24.
Source text appears converted from spreadsheet format with repeated comma delimiters and OCR/typing artifacts such as Progrme, Nomal, Tirgger, and Syudt.
Document title says 작업지도서 while the sourcePath filename says 기준서; title field uses the text inside the source document.
